core_syntax: _RED_FLAG_SYMPTOMS |= {'co giật','nôn ra máu','phân đen','bụng cứng','đau bụng dữ dội','mất ý thức','môi tím','li bì'}
lesson: Keyword-based emergency detection is O(K) per query with frozenset; gaps in keyword coverage cause false-negative triage — 3/10 critical cases missed before fix

logic_pattern: V9.4 Treatment Pipeline — Full Architecture Injection
core_syntax: diagnose_enhanced(symptoms) → router.decide(icd, urgency, constitution, ctx) → format_treatment_output(decision)
lesson: 10 bài học mới ghi vào TUMINH_BRAIN: TreatmentRouter 4-track, Constitution 5-question classifier, Herb lookup 3-tier, Gate 1 pregnancy, Gate 2 drug interaction, Emergency ICD codes, Western referral 13 specialties, 60-herb encyclopedia schema, 50-case QA validation. logic_rules_v2.json cũng được cập nhật 5 sections mới.
source: Cursor Auto-Inject / V9.4 Clinical QA Session

logic_pattern: Emergency Location Panel + Overpass Hospital Proxy
lesson: CORS blocks browser→Overpass/Google Places; server-side POST to overpass-api.de avoids leak and enables one hop; GPS→ipapi→manual preserves triage speed when permission denied.

core_syntax: KnowledgeContribution.create(...) → FederationServer.receive_contribution() → PII scan → validator.validate() → merge if confidence>=0.5; PrivateMemory NEVER calls API
lesson: Private data = bất khả xâm phạm; upload = tự nguyện; contribution_id random UUID, không link user; Evidence wins: WHO>Doctor>Community>Self; Safety override: khi nghi ngờ chọn option an toàn hơn.
